nodes.display: How long have you had the cough?
nodes.wording: How long have you had the cough?

nodes.display: Have you felt short of breath or had trouble breathing?
nodes.wording: Have you felt short of breath or had trouble breathing?

nodes.display: Have you noticed any blood when you cough?
nodes.wording: Have you noticed any blood when you cough?

nodes.display: Have you had any chest pain or discomfort?
nodes.wording: Have you had any chest pain or discomfort?

nodes.display: Have you had a fever or felt feverish?
nodes.wording: Have you had a fever or felt feverish?

nodes.display: Have you had a runny or blocked nose?
nodes.wording: Have you had a runny or blocked nose?

nodes.display: Have you had a sore or scratchy throat?
nodes.wording: Have you had a sore or scratchy throat?

nodes.display: Have you been sneezing more than usual?
nodes.wording: Have you been sneezing more than usual?

nodes.display: Has anyone around you recently had a cold or similar symptoms?
nodes.wording: Has anyone around you recently had a cold or similar symptoms?

nodes.display: Do you feel mucus draining into your throat or need to clear your throat often?
nodes.wording: Do you feel mucus draining into your throat or need to clear your throat often?

nodes.display: Have you noticed any wheezing or a whistling sound when breathing?
nodes.wording: Have you noticed any wheezing or a whistling sound when breathing?

nodes.display: Do you get a burning feeling in your chest or upper stomach?
nodes.wording: Do you get a burning feeling in your chest or upper stomach?

nodes.display: Do you notice sour or bitter fluid coming back into your throat or mouth?
nodes.wording: Do you notice sour or bitter fluid coming back into your throat or mouth?

nodes.display: Does the cough tend to start or get worse after meals?
nodes.wording: Does the cough tend to start or get worse after meals?

nodes.display: Does the cough get worse when you lie down?
nodes.wording: Does the cough get worse when you lie down?
